items.name: Flashlight
items.description: Heavy-duty. The beam is steady even when nothing else is.

items.name: Anxiety Pills
items.description: Valium — left by Lorraine Warren with a handwritten note. 'Take these when the walls speak.'
items.useEffect: The sedative quiets the noise. The walls are still moving. But you can breathe.

items.name: Holy Water
items.description: Water blessed by Father Achampong at St. Michael's, 1973. Ed Warren carried this in every investigation.
items.useEffect: The water is cold against your forehead. The presence in the room draws back, fractionally. You feel briefly and inexplicably safe.

items.name: Warren's Rowan Cross
items.description: Hand-carved from rowan wood. Blessed and left by the Warrens for whoever came after them. This is what drove Bathsheba back in 1974.
items.useEffect: The cross burns warm in your hand. Whatever was pressing against the edges of the room retreats. Not far. But far enough.

items.name: Confessional Key
items.description: Tarnished brass. Opens the confessional alcove. It pulses warm, then ice cold.

items.name: Film Camera
items.description: Old Polaroid. Every photograph it produces shows something the eye didn't register.

items.name: Voice Recorder
items.description: Reel-to-reel tape recorder. The Warrens used these to capture EVP. It's already recording.

items.name: Cameo Locket
items.description: Jewelry found in the séance room. The photograph inside changes each time you open it.

items.name: Ritual Bone
items.description: From the pre-colonial chamber. Arranged with deliberate precision. Do not carry this for long.

items.name: The Warren Session 7 Transcript
items.description: A transcription of what spoke on Warren Session 7. Reading it does something to the reader.
